summary: Multiple Tailscale tailnets at once, no switching + no VM Discussion | Link
content: The official Tailscale client keeps one tailnet active at a time. TailMux makes work and personal tailnets reachable simultaneously on macOS and Linux, without switching accounts, running multiple system daemons, or using a VM. It runs an isolated embedded node per profile and routes by hostname, with strict no-fallback isolation. Use SSH, RDP/SMB, browsers, curl, git, and npm across tailnets at the same time.
chineseSummary: 一次多个 Tailscale tailnet，无需切换+无需 VM 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 官方 Tailscale 客户端一次保持一个 tailnet 处于活动状态。 TailMux 使工作和个人尾网可以在 macOS 和 Linux 上同时访问，无需切换帐户、运行多个系统守护程序或使用虚拟机。它为每个配置文件运行一个隔离的嵌入式节点，并按主机名进行路由，并具有严格的无回退隔离。同时跨尾网使用 SSH、RDP/SMB、浏览器、curl、git 和 npm。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
